meaning: adj.可怕的,吓人的,恐怕的,严重的
examples: Bankers were fearful of a world banking crisis.
They are fearful that unemployment will soon break the barrier of three million.
What on earth are we fearful of?
He says that while a lot of people were fearful of Russian spacecraft, he was excited.
They also found that 32% were fearful of negotiating and 18% find it inherently unpleasant.
